title: Use Team member list as Dropdown
excerpt: Hello!  Is there a way to add a Team to a Dropdown column and have the members listed individually as the available selections?  The members of this Team come and go, so if the column is referencing a Team then the selec…

posts.author: flowinbowen (Matt Bowen)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Is there a way to add a Team to a Dropdown column and have the members listed individually as the available selections? The members of this Team come and go, so if the column is referencing a Team then the selections would update dynamically based on the current Team members. At least that’s what I’m hoping would happen.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Matt,

This is a really cool idea! I am afraid at this time, you’d need to manually add/change each of the team members names in the dropdown labels, as there is no automated process in place at this stage. You’re welcome to submit this as a feature request so our community can add their vote to increase the changes of development
